name: Spring Valley Acquisition Corp. III
business: The company is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands formed to effect a merger or similar business combination. It has entered into a Business Combination Agreement with General Fusion Inc., but the filing does not describe General Fusion's products or customers.

catalysts.event: Entry into Business Combination Agreement with General Fusion Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On January 21, 2026, SVIII entered into a Business Combination Agreement (the Business Combination Agreement ) with General Fusion Inc., a British Columbia limited company ( General Fusion ), and 1573562 B.C. Ltd., a British Columbia limited company ( NewCo ).

catalysts.event: Outside Date for completion of Business Combination
catalysts.sentence: the Business Combination Agreement may be terminated ... if the effective time of the Amalgamation has not occurred by August 31, 2026 (the Outside Date)
